MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySpecialStickyWildFeature1: At the start of any spin, the Special Sticky Wild symbol will move to a random position on the reels and will stay on that position until the end of that spin.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyStickyWildFeature1: When a Wild symbol appears on the reels, the number on the Wild symbol may be indicated as 1, 2 or 3.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyStickyWildFeature2: The number indicated on the Wild symbol represents the number of the times the Wild symbol can be used in a winning combination before it destroys itself.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyStickyWildFeature3: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates a value of 2 or more, the Wild symbol will not destroy itself in the next round and that value is deducted by 1.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyStickyWildFeature4: If a Wild symbol is involved in a win and the number at the top portion of the Wild symbol indicates a value of 1, the Wild symbol will destroy itself in the next round.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplierFeature1: During any spin, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown above the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplierFeature2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplierFeature3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMultiplierFeature4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: During the Free Spins Feature, the multipliers above the reels will be increased to x2, x4, x6 and x10 respectively.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: During the Free Spins Feature, the reels are mirrored, where there are 5 rows in reel 1, 4 rows in reel 2, 2 rows in reel 4 and 1 row in reel 5.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
MermaidRichesPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

MermaidRichesRules.GeneralRules1: Mermaid Riches is a 5-reel (1 row in reel 1, 2 rows in reel 2, 3 rows in reel 3, 4 rows in reel 4 and 5 rows in reel 5) video slot featuring Sticky Wild symbols and win multiplier up to x10.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for 120 ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 120 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

MermaidRichesRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
